Video.summary: Several stolen wigs and one wrecked car have a Mississippi couple standing before the judges.
Video.title: Merriweather vs. Kimmons

Video.summary: Erica is bringing Isaiah to court under allegations of stealing money intended for medical purposes to rent a party bus.
Video.title: Hendrickson vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Imani fights for proof of paternity when Dontel refuses responsibility, demanding DNA before committing to their 1-year-old son.
Video.title: Fann vs. Coleman

Video.summary: Tandrea sues her ex-girlfriend, Chantay, for $1,000 in pet fees that she failed to pay when they moved into an apartment together.
Video.title: Davis vs. Goodman

Video.summary: A woman sues her boyfriend after he tore her dress saying it was too revealing.
Video.title: Edmonds vs. Steele

Video.summary: Trust issues and tension rise as Danielle confronts Brandon about his ex-wife and lack of motivation.
Video.title: Hatch vs. Banks

Video.summary: Devout religion and a party lifestyle collide in Texas couple Lamonte and Leola's relationship.
Video.title: Hawley vs. Gibson

Video.summary: Jessica demands accountability and honesty from Brandon to rebuild trust and secure their family's future amid unresolved conflicts.
Video.title: Williams vs. Williams

Video.summary: Ex-lovers Kaniyah and Bleu feud in court over a stolen pair of limited-edition luxury shoes.
Video.title: Whipple vs. Crawley

Video.summary: Breon issues his girlfriend, Chenika, an ultimatum regarding her refusal to have another baby and grow their family of nine to 10.
Video.title: Holland vs. Bryant

Video.summary: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.
Video.title: Evans vs. Watson

Video.summary: A woman is prepared to walk away from her boyfriend, the father of her unborn child, because of his party lifestyle.
Video.title: Smith vs. Lamisere

Video.summary: Megan and David face the truth as shocking revelations and a polygraph test could change their relationship forever.
Video.title: Antonucci vs. Tamez

Video.summary: A Georgia man questions if his girlfriend’s late night “work calls” mean she’s escorting again. A polygraph test will reveal all.
Video.title: Ubani vs. Green

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.
Video.title: Burroughs vs. Steele

Video.summary: First, an alleged hit and run. Then, a plaintiff claims the defendant left house in shambles.
Video.title: In Shambles

Video.summary: After things go south while living together, exes Eric and Zaniya counter sue each other over money owed.
Video.title: Keeton vs. Barnett

Video.summary: The limits of polyamorous-turned-monogamous couple Ericka and Rashaad are tested when a surprise witness drops a bomb.
Video.title: Calhoun vs. Sowell

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.
Video.title: Paige vs Ware

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: After four years of hookups, Deja is ready to determine her compatibility with Onika and decide if she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Lackely vs. Rivera

Video.summary: After eight years together, Krystal's pregnancy sparks doubts about her fiancé's addictions and honesty, demanding clarity before marriage.
Video.title: Simmons vs. Stephens

Video.summary: The mysterious disappearance of a prized Steelers jersey has Michelle and Ken's 23-year relationship on the line.
Video.title: Lozon vs. Lozon

Video.summary: A blind rapper brings his wife to court with an ultimatum: to drop her maiden name and take his last name.
Video.title: Nelson vs. Crowe

Video.summary: Choreographer Bryant sues ex-girlfriend and R&B artist Olivia for non-payment of services rendered for a music video.
Video.title: Huey vs. Walker

Video.summary: Trust, betrayal and uncertainty collide as Faith demands proof and George fights for their relationship's survival.
Video.title: Payton vs. Payton

Video.summary: As retribution for his serial cheating, Jaylon sues boyfriend Brian for payment from their online video sharing channel profits.
Video.title: Davis vs. Alben

Video.summary: International twerk coach Christopher brings ex-boyfriend Carl to court after they fail at mixing business and pleasure.
Video.title: Lewis vs. Nuckols

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: A series of red flags and an old hometown fling have Danielle questioning her boyfriend's loyalty.
Video.title: Parker vs. Riley

Video.summary: With help from a compatibility expert, the judges advise longtime couple Erica and Turk on family and finances.
Video.title: Virgil vs. Virgil Jr.

Video.summary: An exhausted mother gets a surprise after putting her dreams on hold for her family.
Video.title: Prince vs. Thornton

Video.summary: A Georgia couple seek advice from the judges after struggling with nitpicking, job loss and starting a family.
Video.title: King vs. McFee

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: Complaints of excessive weight gain have Georgia couple Tasha and Prez at odds.
Video.title: Mack vs. Tate

Video.summary: Lomecia confronts Tee over infidelity, family interference and broken trust, demanding a lie detector test to save her marriage.
Video.title: Eason vs. Eason

Video.summary: A young couple battle over responsibility and paternity, with shocking truths waiting to be revealed in court.
Video.title: Caldwell-Roach vs. Roach

Video.summary: A haunted doll and accusations of witchcraft have a formerly married couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Smith vs. Johnston

Video.summary: A paternity battle ignites as Janay seeks justice, while Dale's doubts and secrets keep him on the defensive.
Video.title: Smith vs. Anderson

Video.summary: A boyfriend and girlfriend go head-to-head in court over a discarded promise ring and a broken camera.
Video.title: White vs. Mitchell

Video.summary: Eric is ready to marry Mazii, but she doesn't trust him; the Cutlers help them through their trust and communication issues.
Video.title: Monét vs. Martin

Video.summary: Exes duke it out in court over the paternity of a child.
Video.title: Cornell vs. Pruitt

Video.summary: A rekindled love and broken trust collide as Larry evaluates his future with his ex-wife and their newborn son.
Video.title: Mayes vs. Lebron

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: With the help of an expert witness, the judges address the extravagant spending habits in Ayahna and Clarence's marriage.
Video.title: James vs. James

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: After an incident involving the police and damage to her car, LaShawn grapples with her ex-boyfriend Mario's militant personality.
Video.title: Brown vs. Monk

Video.summary: A polygraph test will determine if Deandre has been unfaithful to his girlfriend, Olivia.
Video.title: Shiel vs. Spraggins

Video.summary: Symoan and Hillary seek answers from the Cutlers' compatibility test in an effort to save their 10-year marriage.
Video.title: Willis vs. Greene

Video.summary: A dramatic dispute over infidelity, fatherhood and responsibility puts a fragile relationship to the ultimate test.
Video.title: Cobb vs. Harper

Video.summary: Ebony challenges Malik's loyalty with a lie detector, testing both his promise and their future in this high-stakes case.
Video.title: Peek vs. Sharpe

Video.summary: Anita is ready for marriage, but Roman suspects she has been cheating; a polygraph may push him to propose or dispose.
Video.title: Raggs vs. Walker

Video.summary: Quintin sues his ex-girlfriend, Lashana, for custody of their dogs after she kicks him out of the house.
Video.title: Grice vs. Jackson

Video.summary: A woman accuses her long-distance boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Matthews vs. Bryant

Video.summary: Friends-turned-lovers Kemuel and Bridget struggle to take their relationship to the next level due to a lack of trust.
Video.title: Crossty vs. Lovelace

Video.summary: A broken gaming console and a stolen laptop have exes Dominique and Deon standing before the judges.
Video.title: Childress vs. Alston

Video.summary: A sports betting addiction brings Erica and her boyfriend to court.
Video.title: East vs. Conner

Video.summary: Aspiring social media star Mike sues ex-girlfriend Sidney for nonpayment after she profited from an explicit adult video.
Video.title: Barham vs. Starr

Video.summary: Shawdae and Travis' relationship began with a fight and will end in one, which is why they've asked for the Cutlers' help.
Video.title: McGraw vs. Herrington

Video.summary: Former roommates and ex-lovers, Shelby and Natalie, settle a dispute over unpaid rent money.
Video.title: Hannan vs. Davila

Video.summary: Will is bringing Jazmine to court in a last-ditch effort to save their relationship from the stresses of social media.
Video.title: Bouie vs. Jackson

Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson
